toast.cannotInviteMoreUsers: Your {{plan}} plan allows {{maxUsers}} users. You currently have {{currentUsers}} users and {{pendingInvitations}} pending invitations.
toast.userRemoved: {{name}} has been removed from the workspace.
toast.copyInviteLink: Email is disabled. Share this link with the invited user.

invite.title: Invite Team Members
invite.description: Send invitations to add new members to your workspace.
invite.descriptionNoEmail: Create invitation links to share with new team members.
invite.emailDisabledBanner: Email is not configured. An invitation link will be generated for you to share manually.
invite.userLimitReached: You've reached your user limit ({{max}} users). Upgrade your plan to invite more users.
invite.emailPlaceholder: Type an email and press Enter to add
invite.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
invite.resultDescription: Share this link with {{email}} to join your workspace. The link expires in 7 days.
invite.copyFailed: Failed to copy link to clipboard

emailChange.smtpDisabledMessage: Email delivery is not configured. Email changes require a verification email to be sent. Please configure SMTP in your instance settings first.

personal.securityDescription: Manage your password and email address for account security

team.title: Team
team.noTeamMembers: No team members found. Invite users to get started.
team.adminOnly: Only workspace administrators can view and manage team members.
team.removeDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} ({{email}}) from this workspace?
team.removeDialogWarning: This action cannot be undone. The user will lose access to all workspace resources and will need to be re-invited to regain access.
